info.name: Compliance Checklist Management API
info.description:
API collection for the Compliance Checklist Management System.

All endpoints return responses in the envelope format:
  {"success": true|false, "message": "string", "data": {}}

**Setup:**
1. Set the `baseUrl` variable to your server address (default: http://localhost:8080).
2. Call POST /api/login and copy the `token` value from the response.
3. Set the `token` collection variable to that value.
4. All other requests will automatically include `Authorization: Bearer <token>`.

**Test credentials:**
- Admin:   admin@example.com / password
- Auditor: auditor@example.com / password

variable.description: Base URL of the API server. Change this if running on a different host or port.
Bearer token obtained from POST /api/login. Copy the token value from the login response and paste it here.

item.name: Authentication
item.description: Endpoints for obtaining and revoking Sanctum bearer tokens.

request.description: Authenticate with email and password to receive a Sanctum bearer token. Copy the `token` value from the response and set it as the `token` collection variable.

originalRequest.description: Authenticate with email and password to receive a Sanctum bearer token. Copy the `token` value from the response and set it as the `token` collection variable.
Authenticate with email and password to receive a Sanctum bearer token. Copy the `token` value from the response and set it as the `token` collection variable.
Authenticate with email and password to receive a Sanctum bearer token. Copy the `token` value from the response and set it as the `token` collection variable.

response.name: 422 Unprocessable – Validation error

originalRequest.description: Authenticate with email and password to receive a Sanctum bearer token. Copy the `token` value from the response and set it as the `token` collection variable.

request.description: Revoke the current Sanctum bearer token. After calling this endpoint the token is invalidated and cannot be reused.

originalRequest.description: Revoke the current Sanctum bearer token. After calling this endpoint the token is invalidated and cannot be reused.
Revoke the current Sanctum bearer token. After calling this endpoint the token is invalidated and cannot be reused.

item.name: Templates
item.description: CRUD endpoints for checklist templates. Admin role required for create, update, and delete. Both Admins and Auditors can list and view templates.

request.description: Return a paginated list of templates. Admins see all templates; Auditors see only `active` templates. Supports optional `search` (title contains), `page`, and `per_page` query parameters.

response.name: 200 OK – Templates retrieved

originalRequest.description: Return a paginated list of templates. Admins see all templates; Auditors see only `active` templates. Supports optional `search` (title contains), `page`, and `per_page` query parameters.
Return a paginated list of templates. Admins see all templates; Auditors see only `active` templates. Supports optional `search` (title contains), `page`, and `per_page` query parameters.

request.description: Create a new checklist template with one or more questions. Admin role required. The template and all questions are persisted in a single database transaction.

response.name: 201 Created – Template created

originalRequest.description: Create a new checklist template with one or more questions. Admin role required. The template and all questions are persisted in a single database transaction.

item.name: Checklists
item.description: Endpoints for auditors to manage their checklist instances. Auditor role required for all endpoints in this folder.

request.description: List all checklist instances belonging to the authenticated auditor. Paginated with 15 records per page.

originalRequest.description: List all checklist instances belonging to the authenticated auditor. Paginated with 15 records per page.
List all checklist instances belonging to the authenticated auditor. Paginated with 15 records per page.
List all checklist instances belonging to the authenticated auditor. Paginated with 15 records per page.

request.description: Start a new checklist instance from an active template. Creates a new instance with status `draft` and returns it with all questions. Auditor role required.

response.name: 201 Created – Checklist started

request.description: Save draft answers for a checklist instance. Can be called multiple times; answers are upserted. Only the owning auditor can save drafts, and only while the instance is in `draft` status.

item.name: Reports
item.description: Reporting endpoint for admins to view all checklist instances with filtering. Admin role required.

request.description: Return a filtered, paginated report of all checklist instances. Admin role required. Supports optional filters: `date_from`, `date_to`, `template_id`, `auditor_id`.

originalRequest.description: Return a filtered, paginated report of all checklist instances. Admin role required. Supports optional filters: `date_from`, `date_to`, `template_id`, `auditor_id`.

item.name: PDF Export
item.description: Endpoints for exporting completed checklist instances as PDF files. PDF generation is asynchronous — dispatch the job first, then download once ready.

request.description: Dispatch an asynchronous queue job to generate a PDF for the specified completed checklist instance. Returns 202 Accepted immediately; the PDF is generated in the background. Both Admin and Auditor roles are permitted.

originalRequest.description: Dispatch an asynchronous queue job to generate a PDF for the specified completed checklist instance. Returns 202 Accepted immediately; the PDF is generated in the background. Both Admin and Auditor roles are permitted.

response.name: 403 Forbidden – Instance belongs to another auditor

originalRequest.description: Dispatch an asynchronous queue job to generate a PDF for the specified completed checklist instance. Returns 202 Accepted immediately; the PDF is generated in the background. Both Admin and Auditor roles are permitted.

response.name: 404 Not Found – Checklist instance not found

originalRequest.description: Dispatch an asynchronous queue job to generate a PDF for the specified completed checklist instance. Returns 202 Accepted immediately; the PDF is generated in the background. Both Admin and Auditor roles are permitted.

response.name: 422 Unprocessable – Instance is not completed

Dispatch an asynchronous queue job to generate a PDF for the specified completed checklist instance. Returns 202 Accepted immediately; the PDF is generated in the background. Both Admin and Auditor roles are permitted.

request.description: Download the generated PDF for a completed checklist instance. Returns the PDF file as a binary stream with `Content-Type: application/pdf`. The PDF must have been generated first via POST /api/checklists/{id}/export-pdf.

response.name: 200 OK – PDF file stream

originalRequest.description: Download the generated PDF for a completed checklist instance. Returns the PDF file as a binary stream with `Content-Type: application/pdf`. The PDF must have been generated first via POST /api/checklists/{id}/export-pdf.

response.name: 404 Not Found – PDF not yet generated
